<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace GeoIp2; interface ProviderInterface { /** * @param string $ipAddress an IPv4 or IPv6 address to lookup * * @return Model\Country a Country model for the requested IP address */ public function country(string $ipAddress): Model\Country; /** * @param string $ipAddress an IPv4 or IPv6 address to lookup * * @return Model\City a City model for the requested IP address */ public function city(string $ipAddress): Model\City; }
